name: Learning Elf
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck with an effect that equips itself to a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Learning Elf" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck with an effect that equips itself to a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Learning Elf" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck with an effect that equips itself to a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Learning Elf" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
